---
title: "Collaborators"
subtitle: "Partners across UCF, academia, industry, government, and the nonprofit sector"
description: "BioMIND collaborators across UCF, peer institutions, industry, government, and international partners. Listings are reviewed before publication."
---

BioMIND collaborates across **disciplines and institutions**. Collaborator listings will be added after faculty approval.

::: {.bm-callout .bm-callout-gold}
**Approval required.** Listings of external organizations and individuals should be reviewed and approved by the relevant collaborators before publication. Please verify with the partner organization before adding a name or logo to this page.
:::

## UCF collaborators

Internal partners across colleges, departments, centers, and initiatives at the University of Central Florida.

| Partner | Type | Focus | Lab(s) |
|---------|------|-------|--------|
| *College / department / center* | UCF unit | *Topic area* | *Lab* |
| *College / department / center* | UCF unit | *Topic area* | *Lab* |

## External academic collaborators

Faculty and groups at peer institutions in the United States and abroad.

| Partner | Institution | Focus | Lab(s) |
|---------|-------------|-------|--------|
| *Faculty / group* | *University* | *Topic area* | *Lab* |
| *Faculty / group* | *University* | *Topic area* | *Lab* |

## Industry and government collaborators

Sponsored research, joint projects, and collaborative engagement with organizations outside academia.

| Partner | Sector | Focus | Lab(s) |
|---------|--------|-------|--------|
| *Organization* | Industry / Government / Nonprofit | *Topic area* | *Lab* |
| *Organization* | Industry / Government / Nonprofit | *Topic area* | *Lab* |

## International collaborators

Active international collaborations across continents.

| Partner | Country | Focus | Lab(s) |
|---------|---------|-------|--------|
| *Group / institution* | *Country* | *Topic area* | *Lab* |
| *Group / institution* | *Country* | *Topic area* | *Lab* |

::: {.bm-callout}
**Editing.** Collaborator entries live in `collaborators/index.qmd`. Please obtain approval from external partners before listing them publicly.
:::
